Class OpenAiCompatibleModel

java.lang.Object
uno.anahata.asi.agi.provider.AbstractModel
uno.anahata.asi.openai.compatible.OpenAiCompatibleModel
Direct Known Subclasses:
HuggingFaceModel, ModalModel
public class OpenAiCompatibleModel extends AbstractModel
A concrete implementation of AbstractModel that communicates with any OpenAI-compatible Chat Completion API using the standard JDK HttpClient.

  • Constructor Details

    • OpenAiCompatibleModel

      public OpenAiCompatibleModel(OpenAiChatCompletionsProvider provider, String modelId, String displayName)
      Constructs an OpenAiCompatibleModel with explicit metadata parameters.
      Parameters:
      provider - the parent provider instance.
      modelId - the unique model identifier.
      displayName - the human-readable display name.

    • OpenAiCompatibleModel

      public OpenAiCompatibleModel(OpenAiChatCompletionsProvider provider, com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.JsonNode node)
      Constructs a model instance from a JSON node returned by the /models endpoint. Extracts ID, ownership, and creation timestamp for display and versioning.
      Parameters:
      provider - The parent provider.
      node - The JSON node containing model metadata.

  • Method Details

    • countTokens

      public int countTokens(String text)
      Counts the number of tokens in the given text string using this model's specific tokenizer.

      Utilizes TokenizerUtils to perform offline, BPE token counting based on configured TokenizerType.

      Specified by:
      countTokens in class AbstractModel
      Parameters:
      text - The text to count tokens for.
      Returns:
      The token count, or 0 if the text is null or empty.

    • countTokens

      public int countTokens(AbstractToolResponse<?> toolResponse)
      Counts the number of tokens consumed by the given tool execution response.

      Model subclasses override this to serialize the response into its exact wire-format (Protobuf FunctionResponse, JSON, etc.) to ensure 100% accurate billing.

      Serializes the base tool response to its flat JSON representation and adds the token cost of any generated attachments (like images or logs) by delegating to the generic binary tokenizer. This mirrors the exact OpenAI-compatible wire-format, where attachments are sent as a separate message item.

      Specified by:
      countTokens in class AbstractModel
      Parameters:
      toolResponse - The tool response instance to count.
      Returns:
      The precise, billing-identical token count.

    • countTokens

      public int countTokens(AbstractToolCall<?,?> toolCall)
      Counts the number of tokens consumed by the given tool call in the context window.

      Model subclasses override this method to serialize the tool call into its exact wire-format (JSON, Protobuf, etc.) to ensure 100% accurate billing.

      Serializes the tool call into a standard OpenAI function call JSON object containing 'name' and 'arguments' properties, and counts its tokens using the active BPE encoding.

      Specified by:
      countTokens in class AbstractModel
      Parameters:
      toolCall - The tool call to count tokens for.
      Returns:
      The total token count.

      public List<String> getSupportedResponseModalities()
      Gets the list of response modalities supported by this model (e.g., "TEXT", "IMAGE", "AUDIO").

      getSupportedResponseModalities in class AbstractModel
      Returns:
      A list of supported response modalities.

    • getAvailableServerTools

      public List<ServerTool> getAvailableServerTools()
      Gets the list of server-side tools available for this model.
      Specified by:
      getAvailableServerTools in class AbstractModel
      Returns:
      A list of available server tools.

    • getDefaultServerTools

      public List<ServerTool> getDefaultServerTools()
      Gets the list of server-side tools that should be enabled by default for this model.
      Specified by:
      getDefaultServerTools in class AbstractModel
      Returns:
      The list of default server tools.

    • getDefaultTemperature

      public Float getDefaultTemperature()
      Gets the default temperature for this model.

      Temperature controls the randomness of the response. Higher values (e.g., 1.0) make the output more random, while lower values (e.g., 0.2) make it more deterministic.

      Specified by:
      getDefaultTemperature in class AbstractModel
      Returns:
      The default temperature, or null if not specified.

    • getDefaultTopK

      public Integer getDefaultTopK()
      Gets the default topK for this model.

      Top-K sampling limits the model's choices to the K most likely next tokens.

      Specified by:
      getDefaultTopK in class AbstractModel
      Returns:
      The default topK, or null if not specified.

    • getDefaultTopP

      public Float getDefaultTopP()
      Gets the default topP for this model.

      Top-P (nucleus) sampling selects tokens whose cumulative probability adds up to the threshold P.

      Specified by:
      getDefaultTopP in class AbstractModel
      Returns:
      The default topP, or null if not specified.

    • getEndpoint

      protected String getEndpoint()
      Gets the relative endpoint URL for Chat Completion requests.
      Returns:
      the sub-resource endpoint string.

    • createModelMessage

      public OpenAiCompatibleModelMessage createModelMessage(Agi agi)
      Instantiates an OpenAI-compatible message container.
      Parameters:
      agi - the parent AGI session.
      Returns:
      a new OpenAiCompatibleModelMessage.

    • generateContent

      public Response generateContent(GenerationRequest request)
      Description copied from class: AbstractModel
      The core method for interacting with an AI model. It takes a configuration object and a list of messages and returns a standardized Response.
      Specified by:
      generateContent in class AbstractModel
      Parameters:
      request - The generation request containing config and history.
      Returns:
      A standardized Response object.

    • generateContentStream

      public void generateContentStream(GenerationRequest request, StreamObserver<Response<? extends AbstractModelMessage>> observer)
      Description copied from class: AbstractModel
      Generates content asynchronously using token streaming.
      Specified by:
      generateContentStream in class AbstractModel
      Parameters:
      request - The generation request containing config and history.
      observer - The observer that will receive the streaming response chunks.

    • routeChunk

      private void routeChunk(com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.JsonNode choice, OpenAiCompatibleModelMessage target)
      Routes a streaming JSON choice chunk to the target message, extracting thoughts or text content dynamically.
      Parameters:
      choice - the JSON choice node from the chunk event.
      target - the target message accumulating the content.

    • getToolDeclarationJson

      public String getToolDeclarationJson(AbstractTool<?,?> tool, RequestConfig config)
      Description copied from class: AbstractModel
      Gets the provider-specific JSON representation of a tool's declaration. This is used by the UI to show exactly what is being sent to the model.
      Specified by:
      getToolDeclarationJson in class AbstractModel
      Parameters:
      tool - The tool to inspect.
      config - The request configuration (e.g. to check useNativeSchemas).
      Returns:
      The JSON string representing the tool declaration.

    • buildParametersNode

      protected com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.node.ObjectNode buildParametersNode(AbstractTool<?,?> tool, boolean strict)
      Builds the JSON Schema parameters node for a tool.
      Parameters:
      tool - The tool to build parameters for.
      strict - Whether to enforce OpenAI 'strict' mode (requires additionalProperties: false).
      Returns:
      The constructed ObjectNode.

    • createResponseWithEstimatedUsage

      protected OpenAiCompatibleResponse createResponseWithEstimatedUsage(Agi agi, String modelId, String jsonPayload, String historyJson, int estimatedPromptTokens, int estimatedCompletionTokens, TokenizerType tokenizerType)
      Creates an OpenAiResponse with estimated usage metadata when the API doesn't provide it. This is used for providers like Modal's GLM-5 that return usage: null in streaming mode.
      Parameters:
      agi - The parent session.
      modelId - The model ID.
      jsonPayload - The request payload JSON.
      historyJson - The history JSON.
      estimatedPromptTokens - Estimated prompt tokens.
      estimatedCompletionTokens - Estimated completion tokens.
      tokenizerType - The tokenizer used for estimation.
      Returns:
      A new OpenAiResponse with estimated usage metadata.

    • preparePayload

      protected com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.node.ObjectNode preparePayload(GenerationRequest request, boolean stream)
      Prepares the final JSON request payload combining system instructions, history, tools, and temperature.
      Parameters:
      request - the current generation request.
      stream - whether the request is streaming.
      Returns:
      the constructed JSON ObjectNode payload.

    • enrichPayload

      protected void enrichPayload(com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.node.ObjectNode payload, GenerationRequest request)
      Hook for subclasses to add or modify payload parameters before sending the request.
      Parameters:
      payload - The JSON payload being constructed.
      request - The generation request.

    • countTokens

      public int countTokens(byte[] data, String mimeType)
      Counts the number of tokens consumed by raw binary data based on its MIME type and model-specific multimodal billing rules.

      This generic signature provides complete decoupling from domain part classes, allowing the model to tokenize any binary payload (such as blob parts or tool attachments).

      Calculates the exact, model-specific multimodal token count for OpenAI-compatible image data. Delegates the header-only image dimension reading to the core ImageMetadataUtils utility, and performs the OpenAI-specific high-detail scaling and tiling calculations.

      Specified by:
      countTokens in class AbstractModel
      Parameters:
      data - The raw binary data of the file or attachment.
      mimeType - The detected MIME type of the binary data (e.g. "image/png").
      Returns:
      The precise, billing-identical multimodal token count.
